creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-09-28 22:56:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-ruby2ruby Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  ruby2ruby provides a means of generating pure ruby code
  easily from ParseTree's Sexps.
  This makes making dynamic language processors
  much easier in ruby than ever before.
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/seattlerb/
  WWW: http://seattlerb.rubyforge.org/ruby2ruby/
  
  PR:             ports/116711
  Submitted by:   TAKATSU Tomonari <tota at rtfm.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2894    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/devel/rubygem-ruby2ruby/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-ruby2ruby/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-ruby2ruby/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +152 -0    ports/devel/rubygem-ruby2ruby/pkg-plist (new)
